creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Strange, works 4 me :

===>  Found saved configuration for libexecinfo-1.1_3

===>  Building for libexecinfo-1.1_3
--- objwarn ---
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/libexecinfo-1.1
--- stacktraverse.So ---
--- execinfo.So ---
--- stacktraverse.So ---
cc -fpic -DPIC  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer   -std=gnu99 -Qunused-arguments  -fstack-protector  -c stacktraverse.c -o stacktraverse.So
--- execinfo.So ---
cc -fpic -DPIC  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer   -std=gnu99 -Qunused-arguments  -fstack-protector  -c execinfo.c -o execinfo.So
--- stacktraverse.o ---
cc  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer   -std=gnu99 -Qunused-arguments  -fstack-protector  -c stacktraverse.c -o stacktraverse.o
--- execinfo.o ---
cc  -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-omit-frame-pointer   -std=gnu99 -Qunused-arguments  -fstack-protector  -c execinfo.c -o execinfo.o
--- libexecinfo.so.1 ---
--- libexecinfo_pic.a ---
building shared library libexecinfo.so.1
building special pic execinfo library
--- libexecinfo.so.1 ---
cc  -fstack-protector -fstack-protector -shared -Wl,-x -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--warn-shared-textrel  -o libexecinfo.so.1 -Wl,-soname,libexecinfo.so.1  `NM='nm' lorder stacktraverse.So execinfo.So | tsort -q` -lm
--- libexecinfo_pic.a ---
ranlib -D libexecinfo_pic.a
--- libexecinfo.a ---
building static execinfo library
ranlib -D libexecinfo.a

`Makefile' is up to date.

install -s -o root -g wheel -m 444     libexecinfo.so.1 /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/stage/usr/local/lib
install -l s libexecinfo.so.1 /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/stage/usr/local/lib/libexecinfo.so
install -o root -g wheel -m 444   libexecinfo_pic.a /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/stage/usr/local/lib
install -C -o root -g wheel -m 444  execinfo.h /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/stage/usr/local/include
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/libexecinfo-1.1/README /usr/ports/devel/libexecinfo/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/libexecinfo
